problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Perovskite. Perovskite crystal structure optimization directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
